creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
Compilig and installing net/samba26 fails on FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE/amd64 as well as on FreeBSD 9.0-RC2/amd64 with the same error.
Since this happens on all platforms we have in use with samba36, I guess it is a common error in one of the ports, but I didn't figure out what port. I already reinstalled libiconv, but the failure goes on ...
